item.title: WonderStone Infant Walkers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fall Hazard; Violate Mandatory Standard for Infant Walkers; Sold on Walmart.com by Wonder Stone Toys
item.company: Online at Walmart.com in April 2026 for about $80.
item.brand: Online at Walmart.com in April 2026 for about $80.
item.summary: This recall involves WonderStone-branded Infant Walkers sold in green and pink. The walkers have a gray fabric seat, a white tray with a detachable music box, six wheels, a foot pad and a white hand lever. "Model No: 616" or "Model No: 616-1" is printed on a white label located under the tray.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: WonderStone Infant Walkers.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled infant walkers immediately and contact Wonder Stone Toys for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to disassemble the walker, remove and cut the fabric seat, write "Recalled" on the top of the tray in permanent marker and send a photo of the disassembled infant walker showing the cut seat and marked tray to wonderstonerecall@outlook.com.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
